StepAction: Freeze current snapshot, hydration, monitor, and page-hook telemetry behavior as baseline-only inventory.
Condition: baseline paths are recorded and marked as non-target authority

StepAction: Define the runtime telemetry event contract, including fact shape, ordering, replay, and idempotency semantics.
Condition: authoritative bus-first event contract is approved for projector consumption

StepAction: Establish the server projector as sole telemetry read-model authority and route downstream state from projector ownership.
Condition: projector aggregate and downstream delivery contract are defined without duplicate authority

StepAction: Cut over canonical session telemetry ownership to the app reducer and require UI surfaces to stay pure consumers.
Condition: reducer canonical slice is defined and legacy steady-state writers are forbidden

StepAction: Demote session.top to bootstrap, reconnect, catch-up, buffer-miss, and degraded recovery transport only.
Condition: snapshot path is explicitly limited to recovery-only use

StepAction: Remove hydration-first, monitor-first, page-hook-first, and fallback-based telemetry writers that conflict with single authority.
Condition: conflicting legacy writers are removed or degraded with no authority relapse

StepAction: Validate that steady-state telemetry flows runtime event to projector to reducer to UI consumer, with session.top used only for recovery.
Condition: validation proves no duplicate authority fallback promotion or architecture drift remains
